commitPolicy: M34.5 must be committed separately after verification; commitHash is updated after the commit.

evidenceCorrections.resolution: Auxiliary cflag/source labels remain interpretation notes, while completion evidence is anchored to primary original-game/CSV/VariableSize.CSV CFLAGNAME/SOURCENAME families.

commitHash: recorded by the M34.5 git commit that includes this closure file

responsibilityItems: Prevent auxiliary source evidence from being used as completion evidence without a primary original source anchor.
Require M34.5 and M35-M52 registry contracts with required scripts and blocking gates.
Require future placeholder scripts to fail explicitly instead of silently passing incomplete milestones.
Require final audit, view/text coverage, full roundtrip, full-port report, complete-port verdict, and verify:complete script contracts.
Require milestone closure to include responsibilityIntegrity so completed status cannot be a count-only scaffold.

closureIntegrityCheck.reason: responsibilityIntegrity is mandatory closure-gate evidence, not an owned source unit or runtime feature unit.

correctionAnalysis.issue: The previous M34.5 closure counted responsibilityIntegrity as an implemented source unit, producing 169 evidence corrections + 19 registry contracts + 1 closure-integrity = 189.
correctionAnalysis.cause: M34.5 is a verification/hardening milestone, so closure-gate integrity was added during closure and then classified like a normal manifest unit. That made the count arithmetically valid but self-referential for strict responsibility closure.
correctionAnalysis.correction: M34.5 now counts only 188 substantive hardening units. responsibilityIntegrity remains mandatory and gate-verified, but it is tracked as a closure integrity check outside owned source-unit totals.
correctionAnalysis.completionMeaning: M34.5 completion means gate/evidence hardening is complete. It does not complete M35-M52 runtime feature behavior.
